name: Reckoner Risk Layer
description: Cross-reference bidders and entities against Reckoner's government waste/fraud/abuse findings

contractors.name: BAE Systems Australia
contractors.description: Donated $288K to Labor and Liberal, landed $8.37B in defence contracts. Key contract: SEA 5000 frigate ($1.89B) direct-sourced. Referred to NACC.

contractors.name: Serco Australia
contractors.description: Donated $115K, collected $7.13B running immigration detention for 15 years. Allegations of violence, neglect. Highest ratio in index.

contractors.name: Boeing Defence Australia
contractors.description: Donated $335K to Labor and Liberal, $4.43B all through direct sourcing or limited tender. Platform lock-in creates decades of sole-source revenue.

contractors.name: CIMIC Group / CPB Contractors
contractors.description: Donated $540K to all three parties. $3.08B in contracts, 41% limited tender. 74% post-donation spike. Spanish-owned parent.

contractors.name: Thales Australia
contractors.description: Donated $195K to Labor and Liberal, landed $2.2B in defence contracts through restricted tender.

contractors.name: Big Four Consultants (PwC, Deloitte, KPMG, EY)
contractors.description: $5B/year on Big Four consulting. 1,270% increase over decade. PwC caught sharing confidential tax policy. 15 firms consume 62% of consulting budget.

departments_agencies.name: Department of Home Affairs
departments_agencies.description: 11 of 14 SES officers skipped conflict of interest declarations on $23.8B contract portfolio

departments_agencies.name: NBN Co
departments_agencies.description: $27.5B cost blowout (93% over estimate). Went 3 years without reporting to shareholders while collecting $2.4B in equity.

departments_agencies.name: Department of Defence
departments_agencies.description: $5.5B FX blowout across 21 projects. $1.8B IT overruns. Multiple procurement failures.

departments_agencies.name: National Disability Insurance Agency
departments_agencies.description: $6-9B/year stolen from NDIS. Before 2024, had 'no real control'. Only caught $142M of $3.4B suspicious claims.

departments_agencies.name: Services Australia
departments_agencies.description: $5B in wrong pension payments over 3 years. Every quarter a miss.

infrastructure_projects.name: Victorian Big Build (combined)
infrastructure_projects.description: West Gate Tunnel + Metro Tunnel + North East Link — $19B combined overruns

tier_mapping.critical: automatic exclusion or mandatory enhanced due diligence
tier_mapping.high: flag for manual review; require additional probity checks
tier_mapping.medium: note for evaluator; include in risk summary
